description: Docs site feature - UI components, API route, and docs bundled together
rationale: .tsx files in docs app = ui domain (232 lines). DEVELOPERS.md = docs domain (13 lines). app/api/.../route.ts contains 'api' and 'route' = api domain (22 lines). 3 domains = ERROR.
notes: Documentation site feature adding API endpoint + UI components + markdown docs. A genuinely mixed PR that should ideally be split into: (1) API endpoint, (2) UI components, (3) docs update.
